story.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)

draft:
I just read about a developer who's been replacing unnecessary apps with web pages. 
This approach highlights the unnecessary complexity of many apps. 
Key benefits include reduced development time and easier maintenance.
What are some instances where you've seen apps that could be simplified to web pages?
#softwaredevelopment #webapps #simplicitymatters
